args:
set -eu
first_explain=$(mktemp)
second_explain=$(mktemp)
first_bundle=$(mktemp -d)
second_bundle=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json > "$first_explain"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json > "$second_explain"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$first_bundle" >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$second_bundle" >/dev/null
python3 - "$first_explain" "$second_explain" "$first_bundle/buildplan.json" "$second_bundle/buildplan.json" "$first_bundle/replay_proof.json" "$second_bundle/replay_proof.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
first_explain = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
second_explain = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
first_build = json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))
second_build = json.load(open(sys.argv[4]))
first_replay = json.load(open(sys.argv[5]))
second_replay = json.load(open(sys.argv[6]))
first_identity = first_explain['plan']['structural_identity']
second_identity = second_explain['plan']['structural_identity']
assert first_identity == second_identity
assert first_identity == first_build['structural_identity']
assert first_identity == second_build['structural_identity']
assert first_replay['result_artifact_identity'] == second_replay['result_artifact_identity']
assert first_replay['request_identity'] == second_replay['request_identity'] == first_identity['request_identity']
PY
printf 'canonical-identity\n'
